series_metadata.series_title: Letter of Transmittal Receipts Depositary Trust Fund
series_metadata.series_description: NRP-39 - This form used to document deposit funds for transmittal to depository trust fund. Original to central office (PR/CO) copy to district office (PR/DO) and copy retained in park files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after audit then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
